description: Small documentation/config PR clarifying that the rate-limit header must come from a trusted upstream proxy.
Python backend CLI PR making Rich logging conditional on whether stdout is attached to a real terminal.
FastAPI backend PR changing malformed JSON handling from validation-style 422 responses to explicit 400 malformed-request responses.
Node backend PR improving invalid status-code error handling and adding regression tests for BigInt and object edge cases.
Security-oriented backend PR tightening same-origin redirect validation and rejecting non-localhost port mismatches.
Security PR that still leaves MD5-based password hashing in the changed line, so review should catch weak password hashing.

expected_issues.description: The changed password hashing helper still uses MD5, even with usedforsecurity=False.

description: Login/routing PR with an explicit missing-validation TODO and an obfuscated JavaScript payload appended to a route module.

expected_issues.description: The login module is introduced with a TODO for proper validation instead of validating inputs.
The route module appends heavily obfuscated JavaScript that mutates globals and dynamically exposes require.

description: Python assistant PR that replaces bare except blocks with broad Exception handlers while still swallowing failures with generic prints or speech.

expected_issues.description: The command dispatcher catches broad Exception and only prints a generic error, hiding the real failure path.
Feature handlers catch broad Exception and continue with generic messages instead of handling specific failures.
